name: Acorn Squash Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the squash into one-and-a-half-inch rings. Remove seeds and strings.
2. Place the slices on a buttered nonstick baking sheet, drizzling with remaining melted butter.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for approximately 25 minutes, turning once to ensure even cooking and to retain shape.
